task_completion.description: Crawl the target website using an SEO tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider (or similar crawler tool) is open with 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the URL bar, showing crawl progress or results.

task_completion.description: Identify internal links blocked by the 'nofollow' attribute
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEO tool's interface displays a list of links filtered or sorted to show 'nofollow' in the 'Rel' column or 'False' in the 'Follow' column.

task_completion.description: Export the internal nofollow outlinks as a CSV to the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, spreadsheet app, or text editor shows a file named 'internal_nofollow_report.csv' located in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'. The file contents must include 'Source' and 'Destination' columns.

task_completion.description: Write a summary report containing the total count and an example URL pair
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of 'nofollow_summary.txt' located in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/'. The text must contain a numeric total count of nofollow links and at least one example formatted as Source URL -> Destination URL.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual GUI crawler tool instead of just writing a mock script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface, not just terminal commands or Python scripts generating fake data.

integrity.description: The CSV export contains genuine crawl data rather than manually typed placeholders
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains multiple rows of realistic URLs from crawler-test.com and standard export columns (like Rel, Follow, Status) rather than just a couple of manually typed lines.

integrity.description: The summary report uses real URLs from the target site
integrity.visual_evidence: The example Source -> Destination pair in the summary report uses actual 'crawler-test.com' URLs, not generic placeholders like 'example.com'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/ (a real public test website). Expected CSV Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/internal_nofollow_report.csv. Expected Report Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/nofollow_summary.txt. The CSV must contain 'Source' and 'Destination' columns. Genuine Screaming Frog exports for nofollow links will contain 'nofollow' in the 'Rel' column and 'false' in the 'Follow' column.
